title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that sends one prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, identifies gaps, and fuses them into a single strengthened response. A budget Fusion setup achieved near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that sends a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, identifies gaps, and merges them into one strengthened response. It matters as an ensemble approach to raising answer quality without relying on a single frontier model. The key takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration reached near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
